narrative:
Laurel Twp township has 743 registered voters, with 52.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.2%, a clear Republican lean of 8.9 percentage points.
